text: Artificial intelligence is increasingly common in the modern workplace. Many companies use automation to handle repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, which can improve efficiency. Productivity tools powered by AI now help workers analyze large amounts of information quickly and generate reports. However, rather than replacing humans entirely, the focus is on human-AI collaboration. For example, an AI might suggest solutions, but a human makes the final decision. This partnership allows people to focus on more creative or complex work. While some jobs will change or disappear, new roles will also emerge, requiring skills in managing and working with AI systems.
